hero.title:
Practice IT
Interviews with AI
hero.subtitle: An AI-powered platform to help you practice job interviews in Information Technology. Practice with real-world questions and receive detailed, instant feedback.

features.label: Features
features.title: Everything you need to ace your interview

aiInterview.title: Multi-dimensional AI Mentors
aiInterview.description: Face off against highly adaptable AI mentors that continuously drill down into your technical skills and practical experience.

feedback.title: Instant Detailed Reports
feedback.description: Receive an in-depth analysis immediately after your interview, highlighting your strengths, weaknesses, and actionable improvement steps.

criteria.title: Professional Evaluation Criteria
criteria.description: Our system automatically scores your performance based on technical proficiency, problem-solving mindset, answer structure, and vocal confidence.

step1.title: Choose a Role
step1.description: Select the IT position you want to practice interviewing for and your experience level.

step2.title: Interview with AI
step2.description: Start a simulated interview session. AI will ask questions tailored to your chosen position.

step3.title: Get Feedback
step3.description: View detailed evaluations, strengths, areas for improvement, and specific advice from AI.

footer.description: An AI-powered platform to help you practice IT job interviews.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Interview with AI. All rights reserved.
